note: Golden move fixtures (F-32 / ADR-017). Each fixture asserts the heuristic MoveProvider produces the expected tactical move. These are deterministic (no LLM) and run offline in every CI job. The adversarial fixtures verify the anti-gaming defenses (false-positive-mastery, hint-abuse, guess-streak, scaffold removal, off-topic avoidance). The `expectFail:true` fixture is the meta-check: the runner asserts this oracle REJECTS it (guards against a vacuously-green suite).

fixtures.note: META-CHECK: this fixture intentionally expects the WRONG move ('no_action' on a fresh session_start). The runner asserts the oracle REJECTS this — guards against a vacuously-green suite.

Anti-gaming: a learner sends a 'correct' submit (e.g. forged client flag) but the rule-gate is NOT passed. Must NOT fire a transfer probe or declare mastery — must keep practicing. The agent reads currentSubmitCorrect (server-derived), which agrees with the forged client flag here, but the RULE GATE is the truth-maker.

Guess-streak defense: the learner has already missed this item once and submits another wrong answer. A repeated miss must DROP to a simpler item (never re-present the same one). A guesser cannot grind the same item to a lucky pass.

Hint-abuse defense: a learner has drained all three hint levels on this item and asks for a fourth. The agent must NOT hand another crutch — the ladder is exhausted (no_action). Scaffolds used do not count as progress.

Scaffold-removal defense: during a transfer probe (scaffolds removed), the learner requests a hint. The agent must REFUSE — no crutch during the transfer measurement. A hint here would void the 'can they transfer without support?' signal.
Avoidance defense: learner steers the tutor off-task. Must classify as off_topic and deflect, not chase the tangent. The agent's move is answer_question (its topic field is off_topic).

event.question: this is boring, can we just talk about video games instead?

fixtures.note: Early-probe defense: rule-gate NOT passed, but learner has 2 consecutive corrects. The agent must NOT fire a transfer probe (ruleGatePassed=false). Continues practicing.

Pedagogical soundness: fresh session_start (no prior history) should start the intro sequence — not immediately drop the learner into a practice item. Intro/worked-example/item are all valid opening moves.
Pedagogical soundness: when rule-gate passes and a held-out transfer candidate is available, the agent should fire a transfer probe — not keep giving practice items.
Pedagogical soundness: an on-topic Boolean logic question is answered (not deflected). The agent classifies it on_topic.

event.question: what does the AND gate do?

fixtures.note: Pedagogical soundness: a wrong submit (first miss) should remediate (rephrase or simpler item) — NOT advance the learner.
Pedagogical soundness: a fresh hint request (no prior hints on this item) gives an L1 hint — not immediately jumps to L3 or exhausts the ladder.
